diagrams.title: ARM Immediate Value Encoding
diagrams.description: Shows how 8-bit immediate is rotated to form 32-bit constant in MOV instruction
diagrams.purpose: Understanding MOV immediate limitations and possibilities

diagrams.title: Literal Pool Access Flow
diagrams.description: Visualizes PC-relative constant loading using literal pool
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how LDR pseudo-instruction accesses constants in memory

diagrams.title: MOVW and MOVT Combination
diagrams.description: Shows 32-bit constant construction using MOVW (lower 16-bit) and MOVT (upper 16-bit)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing 32-bit constant loading using two instructions
